original_prompt: 给这个绿色煎锅做一张淘宝主图，细节多一点，背景可以不是厨房，要求锅斜放。
optimized_prompt:
[Visual Description]
"Modern Chinese E-commerce Cookware scene, Fresh & Minimalist Commercial Photography style. The [Sage Green Frying Pan] is positioned [Tilted diagonally in the center, floating slightly to show both the cream ceramic interior and the matte green exterior].
[Props]: Surrounded by abstract floating ingredients like a fresh asparagus spear and a cracked eggshell (enhancing freshness without a messy kitchen scene).
[Background]: [Clean Studio Background with soft beige and pale green geometric podiums]. Not a kitchen.
Lighting is [Studio Softbox], emphasizing the semi-gloss cream coating and the polished stainless steel handle."

[Text & UI Layout]
"***Layout Style**: Top-Bottom Standard (Top text, Bottom product).
Text Rendering Instructions (Must be High Contrast & Legible):
1. **Main Title**: Content: “森系高颜 陶瓷不粘”. Position: [Top Left Negative Space]. Style: [3D Bold Sans-serif with soft shadow]. Color: [Dark Green or White].
2. **Sub Title**: Content: “一抹即净 轻油少烟”. Style: [Clean and sharp, slightly smaller than main title].
3. **Marketing Banner**: Content: “健康釉面 | 煎炒全能”. Style: [Premium UI, 'Frosted Glass Bar'].
4. **Trust Badge**: Content: “顺丰包邮”. Style: [Translucent Glass Badge with Gold Rim]."
layout_logic: Since the user requested the pan to be 'tilted/slanted' (斜放), the layout should use the diagonal line of the pan handle to guide the eye. Place the Main Title in the top-left corner (the 'start' of the reading path), and let the pan handle point towards the bottom-right or top-right. Keep the background clean (abstract/solid color) to make the green and cream colors of the pan pop.
